demo_timestamps.description: Examples of building with APS viewer and other technologies using the blueprint technique
Execution loop of the four-layer blueprint
Fixing the transform matrix and scaling issues between GLTF and LMV camera systems
Loading 2D sheet from a DWG file and synchronizing it with Map Libra
Running the LMV user interface with Map Libra's elevation system and marker browser

themes: AI-based complex customizations in APS viewer
Challenges and solutions in using LLMs for structured AI projects
Integrating 3D and 2D visualization using Autodesk tools and AI technologies

summary: The video explores advanced AI-based customizations in the APS Viewer through a four-layer blueprint method, addressing challenges with LLMs and showcasing solutions for complex problems, such as synchronizing Revit models with Map Libra visualizations. It details fixes for scaling and transform discrepancies, loading 2D DWG sheets, and enhancing document retrieval and processing through advanced AI agent capabilities.
